summary: Pruned and removed multiple skill files from the .agent/skills repository as part of an ongoing cleanup effort (part 11), deleting mobile design documentation (typography, Android/iOS platforms, touch psychology), mobile developer and security skills, automation skills (Monday, n8n, Notion), architecture patterns (monorepo, multi-cloud, multi-agent), and technical references (Node.js, NestJS, NexJS, observability) to streamline the skill set.
